rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2206.001, which governs limitations on eminent domain for private parties or economic development. No overlap exists.
quote: This section applies to the use of eminent domain under the laws of this state
_note: Rule cited addresses eminent domain limitations; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No textual or topical intersection.
